File-Sharing

Class Connector

Namespace
client_core.core
Assembly
client-core.dll

Class has static objests as connector doesnt require object lifecycle as it only server purpose of validating and returning a connection to a server

public static class Connector
Inheritance
object
Connector
Inherited Members
object.Equals(object)
object.Equals(object, object)
object.GetHashCode()
object.GetType()
object.MemberwiseClone()
object.ReferenceEquals(object, object)
object.ToString()

Methods

Connect(string, int, ILogger)

Creates a connection to the server and validates the server, returns a Connection object if it could be validated

public static Task<Connection?> Connect(string server, int port, ILogger logger)

Parameters

server string

IP address

port int

Port number

logger ILogger

ILogger that was created at initialization

Returns

Task<Connection>

Returns a connection object when a validated connection is estabalished

Exceptions

TimeoutException

When connection takes over more time than timeout was set to, this is thrown

Exception

Returns exception when server couldn't be validated
